title: Roasted Brussels Sprouts and Sprouts Casserole
description: A hearty, comforting casserole filled with roasted Brussels sprouts, topped with a crispy sprouts crust.
instructions: Toss Brussels sprouts with olive oil, salt, and pepper on a baking sheet.
Roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes or until tender.
Mix molten sprouts with roasted Brussels sprouts.
Transfer the mixture to a Dutch casserole dish.
Bake for an additional 10-15 minutes or until the top is golden brown.
Meanwhile, toast some sprouts in a pan until crispy.
Top the casserole with the crispy sprouts before serving.
